---
title: "About"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by **\[Trend Setters\]** For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Anna Leach. The team is comprised of the following team members.

-   Davo Acevedo-Cardona: 2026, Human Language Technologies, College of Behavioural Sciences, University of Arizona

-   Kapadia, Kkshitij: University of Arizona.

-   Muhammed Aamir Naveed, FNU: University of Arizona.

-   Patel, Het: University of Arizona.
